  # EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
  
  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      """Convert a list of triples about a politician into a readable sentence."""
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      # Get the main subject (first triple's subject)
      main_subject = triples[0].subject
  
      # Build sentence parts with proper connectors
      parts = []
      for i, t in enumerate(triples):
          subj = t.subject
          pred = t.predicate
          obj = t.object
  
          if pred == "birthPlace":
              part = f"{subj} was born in {obj}"
          elif pred == "birthDate":
              part = f"{subj} was born on {obj}"
          elif pred == "birthYear":
              part = f"{subj} was born in {obj}"

              part = f"{subj} died in {obj}"
